note: vodiy.ua marks with checkmark the option 'Проїхати перехрестя другим, давши дорогу тільки чорному автомобілю' (=our index 3: pass second, yield only to black car); corroborated by testpdr.online q688 (same text+option order) and traffic logic (main road changes direction -> equal priority among main-road cars -> yield to black car on right).
